name: MindMatch
description: MindMatch is an immersive and stylish memory-matching game designed to challenge your brain and sharpen your focus. Set against a beautiful, glassmorphism-inspired interface, players must uncover pairs of hidden emojis across various board sizes ranging from a beginner-friendly 4x4 to a challenging 8x8 grid.Customize your experience with multiple vibrant themes like Ocean, Midnight, and Candy, and choose from diverse emoji categories including Animals, Food, Nature, and Vehicles. With three difficulty levels that control card visibility and a built-in scoring system that rewards speed and precision
instructions: Mouse Click Tap Interact with menus and flip cards UI Buttons Reset Restart the current game session Menu Return to the main navigation screen Back Return to the previous setup screen
